'''favobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabercat|sabercat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabercat|sabercat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| favobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fævebeth|fævebeth]] || [[word:fævebej|fævebej]] || [[word:fævebesh|fævebesh]] || [[word:fævebe|fævebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:favovoboth|favovoboth]] || [[word:favovoboj|favovoboj]] || [[word:favovobosh|favovobosh]] || [[word:favovobo|favovobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:favoboth|favoboth]] || [[word:favoboj|favoboj]] || [[word:favobosh|favobosh]] || [[word:favobo|favobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:favofboth|favofboth]] || [[word:favofboj|favofboj]] || [[word:favofbosh|favofbosh]] || [[word:favofbof|favofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:favobotho|favobotho]] || [[word:favobojo|favobojo]] || [[word:favobosho|favobosho]] || [[word:favoboko|favoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:favoboth|favoboth]] || [[word:favoboj|favoboj]] || [[word:favobosh|favobosh]] || [[word:favobo|favobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:favobothol|favobothol]] || [[word:favobojol|favobojol]] || [[word:favoboshol|favoboshol]] || [[word:favobokol|favobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:favobothotho|favobothotho]] || [[word:favobojojo|favobojojo]] || [[word:favoboshosho|favoboshosho]] || [[word:favoboko|favoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:favobothon|favobothon]] || [[word:favobojon|favobojon]] || [[word:favoboshon|favoboshon]] || [[word:favobokon|favobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:favobothoro|favobothoro]] || [[word:favobojoro|favobojoro]] || [[word:favoboshoro|favoboshoro]] || [[word:favobokoro|favobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
